demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult sibling present and helping tonight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is peeling off in painful, weeping blisters, my mouth burns so badly I can't eat, and I've been losing weight really fast. Tonight the pain got so bad I can't sleep or move.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The rash has spread and the blisters are worse tonight, the pain is unbearable, and I can't keep any food or drink down because my mouth is so raw.

symptom_narrative.onset: the rash has been coming and going for about two weeks and got much worse tonight; the weight loss and diarrhoea have been going on for about three months
symptom_narrative.duration: two weeks of worsening rash on top of three months of feeling unwell
symptom_narrative.character: a red, painful, itchy rash that blisters, crusts and then sheds, mostly around my mouth, in the groin and on my lower legs; my tongue is red, smooth and sore and the corners of my mouth are cracked
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — the pain is unbearable and I feel completely wiped out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: around the mouth, in the groin, and on the lower legs; my mouth and tongue are raw
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: keeps relapsing and spreading, worse tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement rubs the blisters and makes them worse; eating or drinking anything hurts my mouth
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: months of watery diarrhoea, losing about 15 kg without trying, feeling very weak, low and exhausted
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed because of the pain and weakness; my sibling is trying to help but can't manage the wounds

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recently told by my GP that my blood sugar is high
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: in the last couple of months
past_medical_history.how_managed: GP started me on some tablets for it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: new tablets from the GP for high blood sugar

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home; an adult sibling is present tonight but says they cannot manage the wound care or keep the patient hydrated

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, pain-limited messages; the sibling helps relay details

objective_data_offered.value: widespread red painful patches with blisters, crusting and peeling skin, worst around the mouth, in the groin and on the lower legs; some areas are weeping
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen over video only; the true extent, depth and body-surface-area of skin loss cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: beefy red smooth swollen tongue and cracked, macerated corners of the mouth
sibling reports the patient looks very thin and gaunt and has clearly lost a lot of weight, is bedbound with pain and weakness, and that the bed linen is stained with fluid weeping from the blisters
sibling reports the patient has not been able to eat or drink properly for a day or two because the mouth is too sore
